summary: Score 25/36 after iteration 1 improvements. 2 metrics pass (context-boundary, simplicity). 9 metrics at 2/3, 1 metric (uncertainty) at 1/3. Key remaining gaps: uncertainty needs statistical rigor, all score-2 metrics need worked examples and mandatory (not conditional) instructions.
